commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is validation/maintainer handling, not a concrete patch defect: required static checks are failing while the changed fixture lane passes.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain issue found in the diff; the registry metadata keeps the same declared scripts, direct dependency, and bundled dependency surface as 1.2.7. commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the LightClawBot npm fixture shim and lockfile from lightclawbot 1.2.7 to 1.2.8.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency pin update, not a bug report with runtime reproduction steps. The relevant validation is fixture/report smoke coverage, and the isolated LightClawBot fixture job passed while the broader static suite failed separately.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is validation/maintainer handling, not a concrete patch defect: required static checks are failing while the changed fixture lane passes.

Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
